title: streptoglossa adscendens
intro: Streptoglossa adscendens, also known as the climbing tongue flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to eastern Australia and is often found in coastal areas and woodlands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as sore throats and respiratory problems. The leaves of Streptoglossa adscendens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and are also used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
